scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:prod: NODE_ENV=production PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server --filter @workspace/adhams-erp run build && cp -r artifacts/adhams-erp/dist/public artifacts/api-server/dist/public
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
